# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        skipDefaultCheckout()
        buildDiscarder(
            disableUpstreamDownstreamPrerequisites: true,
            strategy: HudsonFailedBuildStrategy
        )
        timestamps()
        durabilityHint('lightweight')
        lock { label 'jenkins-master' }
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_USERNAME', description: 'Username for authentication (if required)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_PASSWORD', description: 'Password for authentication (if required)')
        string(name: 'SERVER_IP', description: 'IP address of the production server')
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACT_URL = env.ARTIFACT_URL
        ARTIFACT_USERNAME = env.ARTIFACT_USERNAME
        ARTIFACT_PASSWORD = env.ARTIFACT_PASSWORD
        SERVER_IP = env.SERVER_IP
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                sh "curl -u ${ARTIFACT_USERNAME}:${ARTIFACT_PASSWORD} -o /tmp/artifact.zip ${ARTIFACT_URL}"
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production Server') {
            steps {
                sh "scp /tmp/artifact.zip root@${SERVER_IP}:~/"
                sh "ssh root@${SERVER_IP} 'unzip ~/artifact.zip && rm ~/artifact.zip'"
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            emailext body: 'Artifact deployed successfully',
                    recipientProviders: [[$class: 'DevelopersMailRecipientProvider']],
                    subject: 'Artifact Deployment Success'
        }
        failure {
            emailext body: 'Artifact deployment failed. Please check the logs.',
                    recipientProviders: [[$class: 'DevelopersMailRecipientProvider']],
                    subject: 'Artifact Deployment Failure'
        }
    }

    triggers {
        cron('0 0 * * *')
    }
}
